TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Knlibu ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Syurin go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 326 buwan, 1,044 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 62% kyan ku 648 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 38% kyan ku 396 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Truku 52%, Amis 4%, Tayan 3%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Knlibu hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Knlibu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Knlibu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Knlibu hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Knlibu hya' ga Gukut. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ knliβu ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu s~ɕjurin ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, truku **%, amis~ɕ *%, tajan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na knliβu ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na knliβu ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na knliβu ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na knliβu ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na knliβu ħjaʔ ɣa ɣukut. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Knlibu ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Syurin go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 326 buwan, 1,044 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 62% kyan ku 648 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 38% kyan ku 396 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Truku 52%, Amis 4%, Tayan 3%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Knlibu hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Knlibu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Knlibu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Knlibu hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Knlibu hya' ga Gukut. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ knliβu ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu s~ɕjurin ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, truku **%, amis~ɕ *%, tajan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na knliβu ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na knliβu ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na knliβu ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na knliβu ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na knliβu ħjaʔ ɣa ɣukut. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
